title: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.12.1-6]
- Add stylus definitions for the propen group (RHEL-122207)
- Add tablet definitions for the latest Cintiqs (RHEL-122206)
- Fix the overlap for button assignments in the SVG (RHEL-126355)
full_text:
[1.12.1-6]
- Add stylus definitions for the propen group (RHEL-122207)
- Add tablet definitions for the latest Cintiqs (RHEL-122206)
- Fix the overlap for button assignments in the SVG (RHEL-126355)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23333.html
